TobbieII.dance: Tobbie-II repeats the dance for for a certain number of times
TobbieII.dance|param|times: the amount of times to dance; eg. 5
TobbieII.getIR: Read the value sensed by the right side of the infrared sensor.
TobbieII.isObstacle: Determine if there are obstacles on the right side.
TobbieII.isObstacle|param|sensitivity: This controls the threshold between a true and false
TobbieII.rotate: Start rotating to the right or to the left
TobbieII.rotateTime:
Start rotating to the right or to the left
@param [seconds=1.5] Time in seconds Tobbie should Rotate for
TobbieII.shake_head: Tobbie-II shakes his head for a certain number of times.
TobbieII.shake_head|param|times: the amount of times to shake the head; eg. 5
TobbieII.stamp: Tobbie-II stamps his foot for a certain number of times.
TobbieII.stamp|param|times: the amount of times to stamp; eg. 5
TobbieII.walkTime: Make TobbieII for an amount of seconds.
TobbieII.walkTime|param|seconds: The time in seconds Tobbie should walk for
